item.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.toolt: Retain all items and experience on death while in inventory.
item.tuanzis_mod.yuris_revenge.jei.descr:
[Yuri's Revenge]
A tool imbued with mysterious power, capable of shattering indestructible bedrock at unprecedented speeds.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bBedrock Breaker§r: The only tool that can mine and drop bedrock.
2. §bExtreme Speed§r: Amazing destruction speed when facing bedrock.

§7Note: It is nearly useless against any block other than bedrock.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.descri:
[Immortal Talisman]
A life-saving artifact. As long as it's in your inventory, death is no longer the end.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bKeep Inventory§r: Retain all items, armor, and experience upon death.
2. §bSelf-Sacrifice§r: One talisman is consumed each time it saves you.

§cWarning: If all talismans are consumed, death protection will fail!§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.rainbow_sponge.descripti:
[Rainbow Sponge: Advanced Customization Guide]
The sponge acts as a 'Command Card'. Program it via Anvil naming, then merge with an item to apply styles.

§n1. Programming Syntax (Naming)§r
1. §bHex Colors§r: '#RRGGBB' (e.g. #FF5555). [Cost: 8]
2. §bVanilla Styles§r: '&L' (e.g. &l Bold, &o Italic). [Cost: +4 per code]
3. §bSplitting System§r: Use ',' (e.g. &c,&b). Styles apply char-by-char. [Cost: +2 per ',']
4. §bSmart Gradient§r: '&qN#Start-#End'. N=Length. End optional. Smooth shift. [Cost: 8 per char]
§7Note: Gradient codes (&q) show plain text; others show real color as demo.§r

§n2. Applying Styles (Merging)§r
1. §eNormal/Style Merge§r: 32 base + (Styles*16 + Commas*8).
2. §eGradient Merge§r: 32 per character.
3. §eReset Styles§r: Merge '&r' sponge to clear item's custom colors. [Cost: 16]
